text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh, it's here! My head is splitting!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Do not fear! I always get like this after receiving
passionate guidance and extra classes from our
teachers.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You could call it the muscle pain of the brain...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Sore muscles represent growth, so it just means
my brain is growing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
In other words! The already intelligent Bakushin O
is becoming even more intelligent!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! My experience and my theories tell me it
must be so!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to ride this growth spurt! I'll make it a
mental and physical Bakushin, Bakush—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her determination, Sakura Bakushin O's
headache gets the best of her.
